where.if: AND (e.exmy1_id ILIKE '%'||#{searchValue}||'%' OR e.exmy2_id ILIKE '%'||#{searchValue}||'%' OR e.col21 ILIKE '%'||#{searchValue}||'%' OR e.col22 ILIKE '%'||#{searchValue}||'%' OR e.col23 ILIKE '%'||#{searchValue}||'%' OR e.col24 ILIKE '%'||#{searchValue}||'%' OR e.col25 ILIKE '%'||#{searchValue}||'%')

mapper.select: SELECT /* base.zz :: ZzExmy2 :: selectById */ e.exmy1_id, e.exmy2_id, e.col21, e.col22, e.col23, e.col24, e.col25, e.reg_by, e.reg_date, e.upd_by, e.upd_date FROM shopjoy_2604.zz_exmy2 e WHERE e.exmy1_id = #{exmy1Id} AND e.exmy2_id = #{exmy2Id}

SELECT /* base.zz :: ZzExmy2 :: selectList */ e.exmy1_id, e.exmy2_id, e.col21, e.col22, e.col23, e.col24, e.col25, e.reg_by, e.reg_date, e.upd_by, e.upd_date FROM shopjoy_2604.zz_exmy2 e
ORDER BY e.exmy1_id ASC, e.exmy2_id ASC

SELECT /* base.zz :: ZzExmy2 :: selectPageList */ e.exmy1_id, e.exmy2_id, e.col21, e.col22, e.col23, e.col24, e.col25, e.reg_by, e.reg_date, e.upd_by, e.upd_date FROM shopjoy_2604.zz_exmy2 e
ORDER BY e.exmy1_id ASC, e.exmy2_id ASC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(e.*) /* base.zz :: ZzExmy2 :: selectPageCount */ FROM shopjoy_2604.zz_exmy2 e
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO shopjoy_2604.zz_exmy2 /* base.zz :: ZzExmy2 :: insert */ (exmy1_id, exmy2_id, col21, col22, col23, col24, col25, reg_by, reg_date, upd_by, upd_date) VALUES (#{exmy1Id}, #{exmy2Id}, #{col21}, #{col22}, #{col23}, #{col24}, #{col25}, #{regBy}, #{regDate}, #{updBy}, #{updDate})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM shopjoy_2604.zz_exmy2 /* base.zz :: ZzExmy2 :: delete */ WHERE exmy1_id = #{exmy1Id} AND exmy2_id = #{exmy2Id}
